channel.title: Digital Factory Blog
channel.description: Practical guides, prompt packs, and digital tools for creators, freelancers, and side-hustlers.

item.title: 50 ChatGPT Prompts for Freelance Writers (That Actually Work)
item.description: Stop staring at blank pages. These 50 battle-tested prompts help freelance writers pitch faster, write better, and earn more — in under 60 seconds each.
